LayoutObject.name: HTML Close

StyledText.Data: <<FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List header>>

Calculation.Text: FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0

StyledText.Data: Example what the building block could look like

Calculation.Text: List template @ Page item::Number of media containers < 2
List template @ Page item::Number of media containers < 1 Or Media LI PI 1::Container file extension = "svg"
Case ( Media LI PI 1::Container file extension = "svg" ; "data:image/xml+svg," & TextDecode ( Media LI PI 1::Media container ; "utf-8" ) ; "")

List template @ Page item::Number of media containers < 1 And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id Or Media LI PI 1::Container file extension ≠ "svg" Or FAT Block @ Page item::Number of media containers < 1
List template @ Page item::Number of media containers <1 Or Not FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id
List template @ Page item::Number of media containers < 2

StyledText.Data: <<Media LI PI 1::Container original filename>> Width <<Media LI PI 1::Container width>> px. Height: <<Media LI PI 1::Container height>> px. Size: <<Media LI PI 1::Container file size readable>>

Calculation.Text: List template @ Page item::Number of media containers <1
List template @ Page item::Number of media containers <1
Not SubtitleMedia ( Media LI PI 1::Container file extension )

(List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "String" And List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "Number" Or List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0) And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id Or (FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType ≠ "String" And FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType ≠ "Number" Or FAT Block @ Page item::List number of value fields = 0)

(List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "Boolean" Or List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0) And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id Or (FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType ≠ "Boolean" Or FAT Block @ Page item::List number of value fields = 0)

/*(List template @ Page item::Value type ≠ "IO" or List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0) and FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id or (FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType ≠ "IO" or FAT Block @ Page item::List number of value fields = 0)*/ Case ( FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id ; List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "IO" Or List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0; FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType ≠ "IO" Or FAT Block @ Page item::List number of value fields = 0 )

(List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "Color" Or List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0) And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id Or (FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType ≠ "Color" Or FAT Block @ Page item::List number of value fields = 0)

(List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "Page item" Or List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0) And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id Or FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Block @ Page item::List number of value fields = 0
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0
List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "Link" Or List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0

LayoutObject.name: WV

Calculation.Text: List template @ Page item::Number of value fields <1 And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id
List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 1 And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id

LayoutObject.name: T1 TRANS

Calculation.Text: List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 1 And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id Or FAT Block @ Page item::List number of textfields < 1 Or Not FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage

Calculation.Text: List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 1 And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id Or FAT Block @ Page item::List number of textfields < 1 Or FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage

List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 3 And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id

Calculation.Text: FAT Block @ Page item::List number of textfields < 1 Or FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id

Calculation.Text: FAT Block @ Page item::List number of media containers < 1 Or FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id

ScriptReference.name: Add to IO array List item

LayoutObject.name: T1 Copy

Calculation.Text: (List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "Color" Or List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0) And FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id Or (FAT Block @ Page item::List ValueType ≠ "Color" Or FAT Block @ Page item::List number of value fields = 0)

StyledText.Data: This item is not included in export.

Calculation.Text: FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 1
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 0
FAT List item @ Page item::Include in export = 1

StyledText.Data: <<Media LI PI 2::Container original filename>> Width <<Media LI PI 2::Container width>> px. Height: <<Media LI PI 2::Container height>> px. Size: <<Media LI PI 2::Container file size readable>>

Calculation.Text: List template @ Page item::Number of media containers < 2
List template @ Page item::Number of media containers < 2
Not SubtitleMedia ( Media LI PI 2::Container file extension )

LayoutObject.name: Open Link

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "link_id" ; FAT List item @ Page item::Value 1 ) & SetProperty ( "callLayout" ; Get(layoutName ))
List template @ Page item::Value 1 type ≠ "Link" Or List template @ Page item::Number of value fields = 0
SetProperty ( "tab_name" ; "tab1" ) & SetProperty ( "field" ; GetFieldName ( FAT List item::LastAdaptiveSettingsTab ))
SetProperty ( "tab_name" ; "tab2" ) & SetProperty ( "field" ; GetFieldName ( FAT List item::LastAdaptiveSettingsTab ))
SetProperty ( "tab_name" ; "tab3" ) & SetProperty ( "field" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::LastAdaptiveSettingsTab ))
"Select for which IO context this tag should work in"
PatternCount (JSONGetElement ( FAT Tag Value @ PI::Tag Value JSON ; "valuelist_id" ) ; "funkis-cloud")
"How will this list item behave if the user doesn't have the tag active?"
Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0 Or isTranslator
Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0 Or isTranslator
